horoscope: You're gearing up to resolve problems today, dear Aries, while another good part of you wants to relax and detox. Still, with a Mars-Pluto trine, teamwork or networking can get results, and strong alliances can be formed or existing ones enhanced. You're making a good impression, and you could be discovering interesting ways to get your message across or get where you want to go. Priorities emerge today as you gravitate toward situations or projects that help you grow and advance. Rebuilding a project or revisioning a plan or dream may be part of the process now. New ways to connect or get from point A to point B may emerge, and these could lead to opportunities and improvements.

Today's Mars-Pluto transit encourages pouring energy into something you’re passionate about, dear Taurus. You're recognizing that you’re best off with a plan, schedule, or strategy. Having an end-goal, purpose, or overarching plan can help you make better use of your time. You may want to do something especially meaningful with a business, your talents, or your resources. You have special insight into what will truly work for you, and what won't. In fact, if you need to get rid of excess, waste, bad habits, clutter, and other things that may be holding you back from success, today, you are equipped to do so. You're more determined in beneficial ways right now. This is a week for uncovering a resource that truly works for you.

With Mars in your sign, dear Gemini, you want what you want, and you don't care to wait for it! Even so, today, Pluto helps you to focus this energy into something worthwhile. You instinctively gravitate to situations and people that help you grow, improve, learn, and expand your perspective. A long-term plan is likely to form. Projects related to publishing, education, travel, and non-routine activities can benefit now. Putting what you've learned to good use can figure strongly, and your powers to lead, influence, and support others are strong. Activities or studies advance and satisfy you greatly this week. It’s a good time to cultivate, improve, enhance, and support your connections. Even so, you can also experience a stronger drive towards being more self-reliant, and this is also very useful.

If an old habit needs to go, dear Cancer, today is excellent for doing so. The desire is with you to take more control of your life, and the will to match it. Suitable activities today include efforts to recycle, revise, or renew a project. Today's Mars-Pluto transit is powerful for cutting back or rebuilding. You're likely to find yourself in an especially practical mindset now, and you're not as weighed down by sentimentality, making it a fine time to assess what's been holding you back. The goal now is to remove or overcome obstacles as you have all the energy and determination to solve a complex problem. A relationship may reach a new level of intimacy. New insight into dilemmas of an emotional nature could come now. While a lot can be going on behind the scenes or within yourself today, it's also a very good time to reach out to others and share ideas.

Today's Mars-Pluto transit improves focus, confidence, and decisiveness, dear Leo, possibly because it puts you in touch with your real ambitions and desires. There can be breakthrough improvements in your relationships now. This transit may enhance a bond or revive intense feelings. Working with a partner towards a common goal may be part of the picture, or teaming up with a friend can take you somewhere you want to go faster or more successfully. You might decide to take charge of a long-standing problem for once and for all, possessing the determination to put it behind you. Others can be the source of useful resources or advice now. Networking and teamwork can be particularly beneficial to you. Look for allies!

With today's Mars-Pluto trine, dear Virgo, this is a time for gaining an edge. You might work on a project that has long-term potential. Thinking about your overarching goals can help you recognize priorities today. The motivation to get ahead comes from a sense of purpose and of feeling that you’re useful, helpful, and contributing. You're communicating your passion for what you do through your work or tasks, and others are taking note. You can be noticed for the work you do, particularly things you've done in the past. Most importantly, you're enjoying yourself and have a good sense of purpose. You have all the tools available for working on solving challenging problems related to your work or health now, and you can enjoy great success pouring your energies into streamlining or revamping your work or various important projects, perhaps even your routines or daily affairs. Efforts to improve your health may pay off now. You have a strong sense of what will work in your favor, and your plans become clear because of this ability.

With a trine between Mars and Pluto in harmony with your sign today, dear Libra, you're in a great position to get a whole lot done. You may be more courageous in expressing yourself, sharing your talents or work, or reaching out to a new audience, and you can make serious progress on passion projects or studies. It's a good time to suddenly come across a resource that can help you work through a problem area or reach your goals. You can move mountains and meet with greater success if you make certain that others see your confidence or recognize your commitment and passion. Romantic relationships can improve through shared activities or adventures. Doing something different or non-routine with others can be rewarding now. Broadening your viewpoint and beliefs can be part of the picture now, primarily through your connections. Improved relationships can occur through a stronger sense of purpose and shared goals.

You’re focused on making improvements right now, dear Scorpio, and this determination can help boost your connections and projects. You have inner, emotional courage at your disposal. When Mars and Pluto form a harmonious aspect, as they do today, we can toughen up in certain areas of our lives to make improvements and progress. As such, today is powerful for finding resolutions to long-standing problems, particularly those related to your family or personal life. Improvements may involve putting something that has run its course behind you, decluttering, reorganizing, or unloading or unburdening a personal problem. There could be a chance to grow and learn in a close relationship, based on the inner courage to address an issue or face the elephant in the room. With Mercury retrograde, this may not be the best time for brand new projects. Nevertheless, you can be quite determined to rebuild or rework something to your benefit, and these kinds of activities are very favored now. You see your priorities.

With today's Mars-Pluto transit, dear Sagittarius, you're in particularly good shape for communications, partnership, romance, and creativity. Any of these areas can receive a nice boost now. You’re taking these things a little more seriously and focusing on or sorting out your priorities. You have a greater ability to influence a friend or partner through your words, and you may find the courage to move a relationship forward or address a problem area with someone. Shared activities can prosper, and teamwork or partnering up to accomplish a goal or make a decision can be particularly effective. You are determined to get over a hump or resolve a problem, and you're likely to succeed. Others can find you particularly influential or attractive now. With this booster transit in play, you are better able to focus on your studies, projects, or relationships to your advantage. With Mercury retrograde, you may be better off saving brand new beginnings for later, but you can still make a lot of progress with those things already in place.

Mars and Neptune harmonize today, dear Capricorn, and with some refreshment, you may instinctively know how to manage family or co-worker relationships in rewarding ways. You could organically discover an improved way to maintain or restore health, since pulling back from a situation can work wonders in the moment. You may very well need a small change of pace. Energies today encourage a creative approach rather than one that’s too direct. Your desire for change remains powerful today, but your approach is evolving. Slowing down or taking the time to cater to or support someone in your life can be beneficial today, perhaps helping restore the give-and-take balance in a relationship or reduce stress in your life. You might decide to take action to bring more harmony, peace, beauty, or balance to your working and living environments. You might use your creative talents to advance your work, health, or domestic goals.

Today is powerful for your personal appeal, dear Aquarius, and excellent for having the courage to express yourself or your talents and passions. Personal changes and improvements may be in focus, but you're also ready to jump into action when it comes to managing your creative projects, leisure time, hobbies, and romance. You might decide to resolve a conflict in a family or love relationship, as you may be feeling a little fed up with problem areas and now want to put them behind you. You are drawn to situations that tend to work best for you, but you're not afraid to move a little outside of your comfort zone now, which is a major key to success. Your eye may very well be on repackaging yourself in some manner as you want to break through a barrier that has been holding you back from expressing yourself. With Mercury retrograde, it may not be an ideal time for brand new beginnings. However, today is excellent for applying yourself to current ventures and areas of your life that need special attention. Building a deeper connection or breaking ground in a relationship can be a focus. You’re in a strong position to learn about yourself and your capabilities right now.

A boost may come to your personal life today, dear Pisces. Intimate relationships can be strengthened through shows of support. You recognize areas that need some special attention, and you’re ready to take on the challenge. This can be a time when channeling frustrations into resolving a problem can pay off. You're practical, and you're more concerned than usual for your future, and both things lead to better decision-making. This is a time to find ways to express who you truly are through the actions you take, especially in what you are putting behind you. Sometimes we need an extra push to make improvements, and this can come your way via a Mars-Pluto connection that toughens you up enough to put a tricky problem behind you. It's an excellent time for rebuilding, reorganizing, or reworking things, and this can relate to your home and family life, or it might work on an emotional plane. You want to feel more in control of your life, and you can take steps to grow, improve, and empower yourself now.
